description: Use this API to read a power flow raw data file and add all the data specified in it to the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = read(numnam, ifile)

parameters.name: numnam
parameters.description: Flag for bus number or name specification on records. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Filename of the power flow raw data file. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
